trivia_bullets.text: Green Enchantment — Case uncommon (MKM, no. 156, February 9, 2024). Case enchantment type debuts in MKM; three-stage structure (enter / to-solve / Solved) progresses via gameplay actions rather than mana payments — distinct from Classes (Adventures in the Forgotten Realms).
sources: magic.wizards.com: Murders at Karlov Manor Mechanics

trivia_bullets.text: Solve condition: creatures you control have total power 8 or greater. Solved payoff: put a +1/+1 counter on an attacking creature and grant it trample each combat — converts board development into sustained pressure.

No human figures in art — the crime scene IS the card (violated garden, broken tree stump, fallen white creature). Unusual for a green pump/counter enchantment; MKM's top-down design forces genre tropes into color-pie slots.
No flavor text on record for this card.

related_cards.name: Case of the Filched Falcon
related_cards.note: blue Case; same mechanic debut; thematic cluster

related_cards.name: Bite Down on Crime
related_cards.note: same color; fight spell benefiting from power growth the Case generates

related_cards.name: Get a Leg Up
related_cards.note: green instant scaling with creature count; complementary pump in Limited
